framework.name: GNAP-OAuth Relationship Defined as Non-Competing
framework.description: Charter explicitly states GNAP is NOT chartered to develop OAuth 2.0 extensions, and OAuth-compatible work goes back to OAuth WG. This is a clean scope boundary — not fragmentation but parallel tracks with backport path.
framework.raw_quote: This group is not chartered to develop extensions to OAuth 2.0... Functionality back-ported from the protocol developed here to OAuth 2.0 will be directed to the OAuth Working Group

source.title: Grant Negotiation and Authorization Protocol (gnap) Internet Drafts
